name: 100oz Tritan Plastic Redington Beverage Pitcher  - Threshold™
description: Serve squeezed lemons or any other refreshing drink during the warm-weather days with this 100-Ounce Tritan ™ Redington Beverage Pitcher from Threshold™. Featuring a raised, textured design with curved bottom, this beverage pitcher makes a stylish addition to your serveware. Its clear plastic construction offers an easy see-through design to help you see the contents, and the built-in handle and spout make it easy to pour the drink. Use this plastic beverage pitcher to serve beverages during your routine dining or during your gatherings.
